description:
You are the new IT Manager at Pacific Northwest Medical Center. The organization recently deployed FreeScout as their internal IT support help desk, but the system is still using default settings. Configure the system settings with the Company Name 'Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support', the Timezone 'America/Los_Angeles', and the 12-hour time format.

FreeScout admin login:
- URL: http://localhost:8080
- Email: admin@helpdesk.local
- Password: Admin123!

metadata.expected_company_name: Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support
